name: scroll-feed
title: Scroll Feed
description: A loop-friendly column of varied skeleton post cards scrolls upward with subtle motion trails and an agitated pace.

variables.label: Scroll speed
variables.description: Pace of the upward feed movement.

variables.label: Card count
variables.description: Number of skeleton posts in one repeated feed cycle.

variables.label: Cues
variables.description: Comma-separated seconds (from mount start); each cue advances the feed by one card. Empty synthesizes evenly spaced flicks, one per card.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Default none: the feed scrolls until the frame cuts.
